author: Haroen Viaene
subject: fix(PoweredBy): use correct svg (algolia/instantsearch-specs#54)
body:
* fix(PoweredBy): use correct svgNote that this is a breaking change because they don't have `width: 70px` since that's way too smallAlso adds the svg for dark backgrounds with `.ais-PoweredBy--dark` (or should it be `--light`, slightly confused :p)

* chore: new logos
